title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Architected an event-driven Admin Dashboard in React (TypeScript) and Node.js/Express, unifying SaaS subscription management, webhook routing and live analytics for the core operations team.
Built asynchronous job pipelines for 7 platforms (Stripe, PostHog, Cal.com, Make.com and others) using BullMQ and Redis, cutting failed job rates by 90% via retry logic and dead-letter queues.
Modeled real-time application data in Convex for reactive dashboards and webhook-driven subscription state, eliminating polling on the operations UI.
Developed a GPT-4 powered analytics backend (AI-SDK) that queries live business data and generates structured revenue and churn reports, saving ~3 hours of manual work per week.
Containerized backend services with Docker, deployed to Hetzner Cloud and Cloudflare, and set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions and automated type-checking for zero-downtime production releases.

title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
description: Delivered a no-code Website Builder with a recursive component tree engine supporting infinite nested draggable elements, removing the need for manual HTML authoring by non-technical users.
Engineered a Rich Text Editor from scratch with a custom AST-based document model and element inserter (buttons, cards, media embeds, HTML/CSS widget injection), cutting content creation time by 40%.
Improved rendering performance using React, Next.js and Zustand for centralized state management, resulting in faster interaction response across all major editor flows.
Integrated Cloudflare R2 for media storage and deployed the builder on Vercel with PostgreSQL-backed project persistence.

title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
description: Built a concurrent Text-to-Image generation backend integrating SDXL LLM APIs, supporting inpainting, upscaling and style switching for hundreds of simultaneous beta users.
Implemented a full-featured canvas application in Next.js, Zustand and TanStack Query with client-side caching strategies that maintained consistent frame rates during multi-tool editing sessions.
Integrated stateless Clerk Authentication backed by DynamoDB for session management and Tawk.to live chat, improving support response time and 30-day user retention.
Deployed backend workers on AWS (Lambda + S3 + DynamoDB) with SQS queues for async image jobs and set up CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Partnered with Adobe engineering via JIRA to diagnose and resolve software defects across creative workflows, After Effects scripting and enterprise account provisioning through Active Directory.
Reduced average case resolution time by 40% and raised CSAT by 25% by introducing structured troubleshooting decision trees adopted across a 100+ agent team.
Authored technical training documentation and led knowledge-transfer sessions for 50+ new hires, cutting ramp-up time from 6 weeks to under 4 weeks.
Wrote Bash/PowerShell utilities to automate log collection and recurring diagnostic steps, reducing repeated manual work per ticket.
